dialogues.text: (After Nana-chan left, I'm alone in the treatment room...)
(Phew, my first client... somehow made it through safely...)
(She looked so hot in that treatment gown...)
(Wait, what am I thinking?! I need to focus on paying back my debt first!)
(12 weeks until the repayment deadline. At this rate, I'll never make it...)
(I need to think of other ways to earn money...)
(Well then, what should I do this week...)
